name: haptic-impact-light
description: Light physical impact sensation for subtle feedback
usage: Toggling small controls and selecting items

name: haptic-impact-medium
description: Medium physical impact for moderate interaction weight

name: haptic-impact-heavy
description: Heavy physical impact for prominent interaction weight

name: haptic-notification-success
description: Success notification pattern: two light taps

name: haptic-notification-warning
description: Warning notification pattern: three ascending taps
usage: Alerting user to a potential issue

name: haptic-notification-error
description: Error notification pattern: distinct failure rhythm

name: haptic-selection
description: Light single tap for discrete value changes
usage: Scrolling picker wheels and selecting list rows

name: progressive-disclosure
description: Revealing information gradually as user needs it

name: pull-to-refresh
description: Pulling list down past threshold triggers content reload

name: rubber-banding
description: Elastic deceleration when scrolling past content boundaries
usage: All scroll views providing spatial awareness

name: swipe-actions
description: Horizontal swipe on list row reveals contextual action buttons
usage: Quick delete archive or label on list rows

name: context-menu
description: Long press or right-click reveals menu of contextual actions
usage: Secondary actions on any content element

name: drag-and-drop
description: Long press lifts item into drag session for repositioning
usage: Reordering lists and transferring data between apps

name: undo-shake
description: Shaking device presents undo or redo alert dialog
usage: Undoing recent text or action changes

name: peek-and-pop
description: Long press shows preview then pop navigates to destination
usage: Previewing links emails and content before committing
